critical_invariants: Refund reconciliation must be idempotent — replaying the same settlement event never double-credits.
All currency math uses integer minor units; no floating-point rounding in the refund path.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Add idempotent refund reconciliation to the checkout subsystem.
Implemented: a settlement-keyed reconciliation ledger with an idempotency guard on the refund path.
Not implemented: multi-currency netting (out of scope).

self_review_cycles.findings: idempotency guard keyed on settlement id; integer minor units throughout — asserted by a replay test.
